1904830.name: Wildscape
1904830.description:
Paranormalized is a psychological horror game, designed to catch ghosts in breathtaking situations. Squad up with your friends and terminate ghosts.


With fast paced gameplay that won't get repetitive any time soon, you will travel to haunted locations with your buddies, to review the ghost behaviour and destroy the ghost based on its behaviour.

Paranormalized is something new on the market. The idea of ghost hunting might not be entirely new, the way Paranormalized is played changes up the whole ghost hunting genre. Rage at your friends as they miserably fail to hunt the ghost down.


Team up with 4 buddies, and select a map. A member of your team will be randomly selected to be the ghost, with 2 tasks. Prevent getting hunted down, and kill the hunters. The ghost will win if it can kill every hunter.

Game mechanics
With a wide variety of ghosts, and the ghost being a player, the game won't get boring any time soon, as new strategies develop amongst the community.

About the game

  • Breathtaking detailed maps
  • Support for raytracing
  • Performant multiplayer ping
  • Realistic mechanics.
1904830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
